description: Balanced technology resilience across architecture redundancy observability cybersecurity data integrity maintainability governance human safeguards vendor contingency and burden.
Prioritizes cybersecurity detection containment identity protection backups incident response and cyber recovery.
Prioritizes data integrity validation lineage provenance privacy recoverability and trusted information.
Prioritizes modularity graceful degradation isolation loose coupling fallback modes and critical-function protection.
Prioritizes technical-debt reduction documentation tests ownership maps dependency inventories patch governance and repairability.
Prioritizes decision rights accountability auditability vendor review incident governance and public-interest oversight.
Prioritizes accessibility user fallback manual procedures operator sustainability appeal paths and participatory review.
Prioritizes cloud provider fallback data portability API contingency contract review platform diversification and exit planning.
Penalizes implementation burden when budget staffing legacy complexity procurement or governance capacity is constrained.
